decision_framework.local-with-codex-assist: fail_rate<=0.25 with at least one successful/partial sample
decision_framework.codex-preferred: default when evidence is limited or local stability is unclear
decision_framework.codex-required for now: fail_rate>=0.50 with >=2 samples OR repeated hard-failure class with no pass

class_overrides.reason: low observed failure with incomplete confidence
class_overrides.heuristic: When repeated failures persist after one local attempt, escalate earlier with full test context.

operator_guidance.apply_cycle_limit: Apply 1-2 local rule updates per cycle, then re-evaluate.
operator_guidance.fallback_rule: If class/trigger is unknown, start tactical for routine work and escalate explicitly when blocked.
